source_limitations: The workflow does not encode adolescent, adult, reproductive-life-stage, or diagnostic qualifiers.

Acute pelvic pain, galactorrhoea, waist circumference, acanthosis, fertility concern, lifestyle context, lifestyle advice, medication plan, metformin, referral, generic clinician plan, fixed follow-up intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, hormonal-result interpretation, fertility planning, treatment, medicine selection or dose, targets, and referral remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
